meaning: n.用蜡染色法,用蜡染色的布
examples: Susan learned about batik in college.
Scalable Vector Graphics (using Apache Batik) was picked up for this purpose.
Nearby Arab Street is a good place for batik prints, sarongs and bamboo baskets.
Witness purple seersucker, batik fedoras, and the lovely Lauren Rae Levy in vintage Chanel sunglasses.
